## ShNodes.ShAnyNode type

The union of every normalized node type this bridge can produce.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ShAnyNode =
  | ShArithmCmdNode
  | ShArithmExpNode
  | ShArrayElemNode
  | ShArrayExprNode
  | ShAssignNode
  | ShBinaryArithmNode
  | ShBinaryCmdNode
  | ShBinaryTestNode
  | ShBlockNode
  | ShBraceExpNode
  | ShCStyleLoopNode
  | ShCallExprNode
  | ShCaseClauseNode
  | ShCaseItemNode
  | ShCmdSubstNode
  | ShCommentNode
  | ShCoprocClauseNode
  | ShDblQuotedNode
  | ShDeclClauseNode
  | ShExpansionNode
  | ShExtGlobNode
  | ShFileNode
  | ShFlagsArithmNode
  | ShForClauseNode
  | ShFuncDeclNode
  | ShIfClauseNode
  | ShLetClauseNode
  | ShLitNode
  | ShParamExpNode
  | ShParenArithmNode
  | ShParenTestNode
  | ShProcSubstNode
  | ShRedirectNode
  | ShReplaceNode
  | ShSglQuotedNode
  | ShSliceNode
  | ShStmtNode
  | ShSubshellNode
  | ShTestClauseNode
  | ShTestDeclNode
  | ShTimeClauseNode
  | ShUnaryArithmNode
  | ShUnaryTestNode
  | ShWhileClauseNode
  | ShWordNode
  | ShWordIterNode;
```
